Hearing held. Judge Pro Tem Phillip Ward's Report and Recommendation is discussed and reviewed by the court. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the Judge Pro Tem's Report and Recommendation as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION OF TO COMPEL AND MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER RE: DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF MELANIE GARCIA; AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS is granted in part. Defendants are granted an additional five hours of deposition time as to plaintiff Melanie Garcia, recesses excluded, as recommended by Judge Pro Tem Phillip Ward. Discovery to remain open until trial. Sanctions are denied.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
